title: FLP's 2024 law scholars, fellows, and winners
primary_topics: First Lady Louise Araneta-Marcos as special guest
sub_topics: Louise Araneta-Marcos as practicing lawyer / law professor
Araneta-Marcos dissolving her law firm before Marcos Jr.'s inauguration
Lucio Tan III (Stanford summa, PAL Holdings)
Darlene Marie Berberabe (UP law dean, FLP Professorial Chair)
FLP Prosperity Fund (Esmel fellows + MSME equity + management expertise)

stances.claim: First Lady Louise Araneta-Marcos is 'a real charmer' — she possessed 'vaunted competence as a practicing lawyer and law professor,' dissolved her entrenched law firm before her husband assumed office, and acted spontaneously friendly when CJ formally met her in 2023.
stances.rhetorical_move: structured-credential admiration + dissolution-of-law-firm emulation (echoing Salonga 1986 / CJ 1995)

stances.claim: FLP is the only entity aspiring to both invest in and help manage MSMEs — while there are firms doing microfinancing, FLP's combination of equity investment plus Esmel-fellow management expertise will make MSMEs 'more credit-worthy and growth-worthy.'

FLP's second decade (2021-2031) aims to set up an immersive, interactive, AI-powered Center for Liberty and Prosperity (housing the Museum, in SC partnership) and a multibillion-peso Prosperity Fund to help eliminate extreme poverty by investing in MSME equity and management — 'thereby unleashing their entrepreneurial ingenuity.'
stances.rhetorical_move: twin-beacons institutional-roadmap + 'unleashing entrepreneurial ingenuity' signature phrase

institutions: Chamber of Mines of the Philippines

signature_phrases: A REAL CHARMER, FIRST LADY LOUISE ARANETA-MARCOS IS
vaunted competence as a practicing lawyer and law professor
immersive, interactive, AI-powered, and tech-driven Center for Liberty and Prosperity
register_markers: operational reporting tone with First Lady tribute opening
decision_framework_signals: applies FL-as-charmer + lawyer-credentialing framing for endorsement of public figures
frames law-firm dissolution upon spouse's high office (Araneta-Marcos pre-inauguration) as ethical exemplar — echoing Salonga 1986 and CJ 1995
uses unique-value-proposition framing (equity investment + management expertise) to distinguish FLP from existing microfinance
notable_anecdotes: First Lady Louise Araneta-Marcos dissolving her entrenched law firm before her husband assumed office — a parallel to Salonga's 1986 disbandment upon PCGG appointment and CJ's own 1995 dissolution upon SC appointment
Meeting the First Lady formally on June 28, 2023 at a Michelangelo Sistine Chapel reproduction exhibit, then again on August 22, 2023 at the Toyota Philippines 35th anniversary
The First Lady requesting postponement from August 19 because that date is encompassed by her 'sacred' days
